title: Product vs Brand
context: Business, marketing, creator products, and customer trust
surface_question: Is a brand just a logo, name, or color?
a_root: A functional solution to a problem.
b_root: Stored trust and meaning in the mind of an audience.
a_causal_chain: problem -> solution -> use -> outcome -> satisfaction or failure
b_causal_chain: repeated signal -> memory -> trust -> expectation -> preference -> loyalty
hidden_difference: Product delivers utility. Brand preserves trust memory.
a_failure_mode: Product fails when it does not solve the problem or creates poor user experience.
b_failure_mode: Brand fails when promise and reality diverge.
conditional_verdict: A good product earns trust. A strong brand stores it.
final_line: A product solves a problem. A brand stores trust.
